machine_end_gcode:
G4 ; Wait
M104 S0 ; turn off temperature
G91 ; Set coordinates to relative
G1 F1800 E-3 ; Retract filament 3 mm to prevent oozing
G90 ; Set coordinates to absolute
G28 X0  ; home X axis
M84     ; disable motors
machine_start_gcode:
M140 S[first_layer_bed_temperature] ; set bed temperature
M104 S[first_layer_temperature] ; set hotend temperature
; Wait for both bed and hotend to reach temperature
M190 S[first_layer_bed_temperature] ; waiting for the temperature of the print bed
M109 S[first_layer_temperature] ; waiting for hotend temperature
G28 ; home all axes
G1 Z5 F5000 ; lift nozzle
G1 Z15.0 F6000 ;Move the platform down 15 mm
G0 X0 Y0 F9000 ; Move forward
G0 Z0.4 ; Lower to bed
G92 E0 ; Reset extrusion length
G1 X40 E25 F500 ; Extrude 25 mm of filament in 4 cm line
G92 E0 ; zeroing the extrusion length
G1 E-1 F500 ; Undo a bit
G1 X80 F4000 ; Quickly wipe off the filament line
name: Kobra 2 Neo
